description_long: This house features a whimsical, gingerbread-inspired design with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in white and brown blocks, mimicking snow and gingerbread. The facade is adorned with colorful, blocky candy-like decorations around the windows, door, and along the base, enhancing its festive appearance. Two candy cane pillars flank the front steps, while a large pink chimney rises from the rear side of the roof. The windows are small and rectangular, symmetrically placed on both the front and back walls. The house sits on a raised, stepped platform, giving it a prominent, elevated look. The overall structure is compact, with playful, pixelated details reminiscent of holiday gingerbread houses.
description: A festive, gingerbread-style house with a steep gable roof, candy cane pillars, colorful decorations, and a large pink chimney, all set on a raised platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with candy cane pillars, colorful decorations around the door and windows, and the stepped platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof, candy cane pillar, and minimal window detailing, with the chimney not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a similar gable structure as the front, with fewer decorations and a clear view of the pink chimney.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the large pink chimney, candy cane pillar, and simple window arrangement.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with steps, flanked by candy cane pillars and colorful decorative blocks, no porch or overhang.
